contentSnippet: The NASDAQ 100 gapped up 3.5% at the open on Wednesday, its largest single-session percentage gain since May 12, 2025. The cause was US President Donald Trump agreeing to a two-week ceasefire with Iran late Tuesday, hours before he promised to destroy the country.
